Bluffton & Hilton Head, South Carolina

Coastal Paws Veterinary Clinic

Gentle, attentive care for the pets you love — from wellness visits to treatment plans, we help your companion feel safe, healthy, and right at home.

Request an Appointment View Services

Compassionate veterinary care with a calm, low-stress approach for dogs, cats, and small pets.

Your neighborhood pet care team

Friendly care. Clear answers. Trusted support.

  • Appointments for routine checkups and preventive care
  • Thoughtful treatment plans tailored to your pet's needs
  • Convenient care for families across the Lowcountry

Services for every stage of pet health

We keep care simple and clear, with a focus on prevention, comfort, and practical support for busy pet owners.

Wellness Exams

Routine checkups to support long-term health and catch concerns early.

Vaccinations

Protective care plans tailored to your pet's age, lifestyle, and risks.

Dental Care

Preventive dental services that support comfort, eating, and fresh breath.

Surgery

Careful surgical support with patient safety and communication at every step.

Why pet families choose Coastal Paws

We know a vet visit can feel stressful. Our team focuses on calm handling, straightforward communication, and a welcoming experience for both pets and people.

Warm, friendly care

We treat every pet like a valued member of the family.

Clear guidance

We explain options in plain language so you can make informed decisions.

A calm experience from the start

From your first call to your pet's visit, we aim for thoughtful, low-stress care that helps you feel confident and supported.

Convenient access for Bluffton and Hilton Head pet owners

Respectful, caring communication at every step

Preventive care that helps your pet stay healthier longer

Request an appointment

Send us a few details and our team will reach out to help find the right time for your visit.

What to include

  • Basic contact information so we can follow up quickly
  • Your pet's name and type
  • A short reason for the visit

If your pet needs urgent care, please call us right away instead of using the form.

We'll review your request and reach out soon.

Coastal Paws Veterinary Clinic

Caring for pets across Bluffton and Hilton Head with a calm, professional approach.

Visit us

123 Lowcountry Lane
Bluffton, SC 29910

Hours & contact

Mon–Fri: 8:00 AM – 5:30 PM
Sat: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM
Sun: Closed
